{
  "isSuspicious": true,
  "deviation": "Frequent registry modifications in the user's software hive combined with connections to RPC endpoint mapper (port 135) and a high-numbered port. This pattern is often observed in PowerShell scripts performing reconnaissance, enumeration, or establishing persistence, which deviates from typical benign PowerShell usage.",
  "indicators": [
    "powershell.exe",
    "reg_create",
    "HKU\\S-1-5-21",
    "connect",
    "port 135",
    "RPC"
  ]
